title: Orchard spending key derivation and payment address
description: Derive Orchard spending key from ZIP-32 account key and extract the Orchard payment address (default diversifier index 0). This mirrors the Sapling derivation bead and is a co-prerequisite for ZIP-316 Unified Address assembly. Use a subagent to check the orchard crate API (SpendingKey::from_zip32_seed or equivalent) in zcash/librustzcash source to confirm the exact call signature before coding. Defensive programming: Orchard SpendingKey must not be logged; validate that orchard key material differs from sapling key material at test time (not same bytes).
acceptance_criteria: Unit test: known-vector derivation from zcash orchard test suite. Test that Orchard address != Sapling address for the same account (sanity cross-check).
close_reason: OrchardSpendingKey, OrchardFullViewingKey, default_address via from_zip32_seed. 5 tests pass including test-vector oracle and Orchard≠Sapling cross-check.
